document_info.prepared_by: David Reinhardt, Vice President, Transportation Insurance Specialists

business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics company providing LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing, and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors.

coverages_discussed.notes: Workers' Compensation coverage is provided through Ohio Bureau of Workers' Compensation per state statute.
Occurrence form including standard premises/operations and products/completed operations.
Covers all owned, hired, and non-owned vehicles.
Coverage for all scheduled locations on a special form with replacement cost valuation.
Following form over primary GL, Auto, and Employer's Liability.
Motor Truck Cargo coverage requested as per expiring program.

positives: Formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually.
Dedicated safety committee meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits.
Employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative have been in place for over five years.
Contractual risk transfer provisions are included in all subcontractor and vendor agreements.
Third-party risk control survey completed within the past 12 months with favorable results.
Formal return-to-work program has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%.
All locations are equipped with security camera systems and 24/7 monitoring services.
Structured HR program supports low turnover and consistent safety training.
Fleet of 37 vehicles is maintained under a documented preventive maintenance schedule.
Broker notes favorable loss history and proactive risk management.
concerns: Loss experience shows a mixed trend with some large individual claims during the review period.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Over the review period, the insured incurred 48 total claims with 1378733.13 in total paid losses and 1503069.19 total incurred. Currently, 10 claims remain open and 38 have been closed. Approximate loss ratio is 12.9% over 5 loss years. By coverage line: Workers' Compensation 24 claims, 826622.56 paid, 888785.06 incurred; General Liability 5 claims, 54126.51 paid, 54126.51 incurred; Commercial Auto 16 claims, 387376.46 paid, 449550.02 incurred; Commercial Property 2 claims, 106691.36 paid, 106691.36 incurred; Umbrella / Excess 0 claims, 0 paid, 0 incurred; Motor Truck Cargo 1 claim, 3916.24 paid, 3916.24 incurred.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: We are pleased to submit Great Lakes Freight Systems, Inc. for your review and consideration. The insured is a regional trucking and freight logistics company providing LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors, headquartered in Columbus, with approximately 38 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Workers' Compensation, General Liability, Commercial Auto, Commercial Property, Umbrella / Excess, and Motor Truck Cargo.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics company providing LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors, headquartered in Columbus.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: The insured maintains a dedicated safety committee that meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits. An employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative have been in place for over five years. A third-party risk control survey was completed within the past 12 months with favorable results. The insured has implemented a formal return-to-work program that has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%. All locations are equipped with security camera systems and 24/7 monitoring services. With 485 employees and a structured HR program, the insured maintains low turnover and consistent safety training. The insured's fleet of 37 vehicles is maintained under a documented preventive maintenance schedule.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: The loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period. Over the review period, the insured has incurred 48 total claims with 1378733.13 in total paid losses and 1503069.19 total incurred. Currently, 10 claims remain open and 38 have been closed. Approximate loss ratio is 12.9% over 5 loss years.
